enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about daily life in Boulder, covering intermittent internet issues and his dilemma between CenturyLink and Comcast, a strange problem where he can't comment on his own YouTube videos, and his progress building a Colorado ski resort website with active and defunct resort pages.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Skeptical of switching to Comcast based on a CenturyLink rep's advice; wants to gather more opinions before deciding
Dislikes drinking because it drains his energy and disrupts his sleep
Will record videos offline in the future and upload when internet is available
